About Organization

Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission is a government organization responsible for recruiting personnel for the Bihar police department.

The commission is headed by a chairman and has several members who are responsible for conducting recruitment exams and selecting candidates for various posts.

About the Programme

The BPSSC ASI Technical programme is a recruitment drive for 22 Assistant Sub-Inspector (Technical) posts in the Bihar police department.

The programme aims to select eligible candidates for the posts and provide them with training and employment opportunities.
